description_long: This rice cooker features a rounded rectangular body with a smooth, white exterior and a slightly domed top. The front panel is equipped with a digital control interface, including a yellow-bordered display screen and an array of tactile buttons, each marked with icons or text for various cooking functions. The lid is integrated into the top surface, with a translucent circular window that allows visibility into the cooking chamber. The overall design is compact and modern, with no visible handles or external attachments. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing the functional front and top. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components likely used internally.
description: A compact, white rice cooker with a digital control panel and a translucent window on the lid. The design is modern and smooth, with a focus on the front control interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital control panel with display and buttons, and the translucent lid window.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, unadorned surface and the slight curvature of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back with no visible controls or attachments.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the continuous, seamless body design.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front top surface, featuring a rectangular digital display in the center with a yellow border. Surrounding the display are at least 10 tactile buttons, arranged in a grid and arc pattern, each with distinct icons or text labels for different cooking functions. There are no visible dials or switches, but some buttons have raised icons and indicator lights.
attribute_lid_design: The lid is integrated into the top surface, circular in shape with a translucent window at the center. It appears to be hinged at the back, allowing it to open upwards. No visible handles or locks are present, and the window may serve as a vent.
